questionHtml: State two assumptions of the kinetic model of an ideal gas that refer to intermolecular collisions.
markschemeHtml:
The collisions are elastic ✓

The time for a collision is much shorter than the time between collisions ✓

The intermolecular forces are only present during collisions ✓

meta.title: State two assumptions of the kinetic model of an ideal gas that refer to intermolecular collisions.
